title: Void Initiate
description: A recruit tuned to the first fracture frequency.

title: Neon Scout
description: Reveals the safest path through broken districts.

title: Static Ward
description: Give an ally +0/+2 until the next pulse.

title: Rust Drone
description: Cheap machine body, loyal until the core burns out.

title: Market Signal
description: Draw a demo card from the outer market ledger.

title: Ash Mender
description: Restores splintered armor with ember-thread sutures.

title: Mirror Spark
description: Deal 1 damage and mark the target with reflected light.

title: Basalt Guard
description: A patient sentinel carved from collapsed skyline stone.

title: Fractal Map
description: Smooths the next route through the hub and grants tempo.

title: Gloom Pact
description: Sacrifice stability to empower a character by +2 attack.

title: Oracle
description: Look beyond the fracture and prepare the best future line.

title: Sandstorm
description: All enemy characters lose 1 attack in a golden data storm.

title: Energy Sword
description: Attach a blade of condensed neon to grant +2/+1.

title: Double Speed
description: A character may strike twice during the current tempo window.

title: Book Knowledge
description: Draw two answers from an impossible archive.

title: Seventy One
description: An outlaw construct with a forbidden serial etched in chrome.

title: Glass Seraph
description: Protects the weak with mirrored wings and severe judgement.

title: Rift Tax
description: Steal one resource from the enemy's unstable economy.

title: Shield of Hope
description: Give all allies a luminous barrier before the breach lands.

title: Wood Vines
description: Root an enemy character and drain its attack through living wire.

title: Dragon Eye
description: Reveal the enemy hand and burn the most expensive option.

title: Shadow Sword
description: Equip a character with a blade that ignores the first guard.

title: Quantum Herald
description: Copies the last event as a weak echo when summoned.

title: Lunar Forge
description: Upgrade the lowest-cost card in your hand with moonsteel.

title: Tree of Life
description: At turn end, heals every ally rooted in the same reality.

title: Hyper Night
description: The city falls dark; your next three effects cost 0 this turn.

title: Time of Reckoning
description: Destroy damaged enemies and award a pulse of coins in demo mode.

title: Sunken Titan
description: Rises from the lower city and stuns every smaller enemy.

title: Reverse Heart
description: Invert lethal damage once and convert the fracture into healing.

title: Amulet of Old Sage
description: Choose a legendary echo from outside the match and bind it to your deck.
